response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics for 'SNAKE EYES' matched the latter half of the video. The first half features 'VDOL' by Kikuo, which was not described in the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed 'VDOL' and the interlude talk segment manually, then used the provided lyrics for the 'SNAKE EYES' portion. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are perfectly aligned with fast-paced singing and dialogue delivery, with clear translations for Japanese, Korean, and English.

subtitles.original: 疲れた！ I'm so tired!
subtitles.english: I'm exhausted! I'm so tired!

subtitles.original: I hope you guys have been enjoying the show!
subtitles.english: I hope you guys have been enjoying the show!

subtitles.original: We had so many bangers after bangers after bangers!
subtitles.english: We had so many bangers after bangers after bangers!

subtitles.original: A lot of dancing, we had PONLIGHT, we had Cyberpunk Dead Boy, we had V...

subtitles.original: My arms are dead, everything dead.
subtitles.english: My arms are dead, everything dead.

subtitles.original: But, that's not the end of the show yet! We gotta keep going on and on and on and on!
subtitles.english: But, that's not the end of the show yet! We gotta keep going on and on and on and on!

subtitles.original: And here, I bring you a very, very, very important and...
subtitles.english: And here, I bring you a very, very, very important and...

subtitles.original: ...exciting announcement!
subtitles.english: ...exciting announcement!

subtitles.original: I am about to perform a song that no one has heard before.
subtitles.english: I am about to perform a song that no one has heard before.

subtitles.original: No one! Except for me, because...
subtitles.english: No one! Except for me, because...

subtitles.original: ...IT'S MY NEW SONG!!!
subtitles.english: ...IT'S MY NEW SONG!!!

subtitles.original: I've been hyping this up for a while now, because I'm really, really excited...
subtitles.english: I've been hyping this up for a while now, because I'm really, really excited...

subtitles.original: ...and this will be the first time that I'm sharing it with all of you, so I hope you enjoy.
subtitles.english: ...and this will be the first time that I'm sharing it with all of you, so I hope you enjoy.

subtitles.original: More info after I perform it, because you gotta see it first, you know?
subtitles.english: More info after I perform it, because you gotta see it first, you know?
